channel.title: Chandra's Ckloud Journal
channel.description: Recent content on Chandra's Ckloud Journal

item.title: Debugging AWS Lambda: Why Your Zip File Structure Matters
item.description: How a nested zip file and a Python runtime mismatch caused a frustrating ImportModuleError — and how I fixed it.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Chandra Kanth — a cloud computing enthusiast building hands-on projects with Azure and AWS.

This blog documents my cloud journey: real projects, real debugging, and real lessons learned. I’m currently preparing for Azure certification while working on infrastructure deployments, application modernization, and serverless architectures.

Projects

  • AWS Lambda + RDS MySQL — Serverless database queries with Python
  • Azure Mattermost Deployment — Two-tier architecture with MySQL backend
  • Azure Application Modernization — Strangler Fig pattern with VMSS, Traffic Manager, and App Gateway
  • AWS OpenSearch “MyGoogle” — Custom search engine

Connect

  • LinkedIn
  • GitHub
